summary: Frontend-only testing of Koora Voice app video/camera features. All 5 requested features verified: Login works, Dashboard displays rooms correctly, Camera button appears in control bar when on stage, Toggle buttons (Mics/Cameras) appear in room page, Participants list shows follow button for other users.

login_page: Login form with identifier and password inputs working
Login with credentials naifliver@gmail.com / As11223344 successful
dashboard_page: Room cards show: image, participant count, member count, category badge
Member badge 'عضو' displayed for joined rooms
room_page_view_mode_toggles: المايكات (Mics) toggle button found and working
الكاميرات (Cameras) toggle button found and working
البث المباشر (Live Stream) toggle button visible
View mode switches correctly between mics and cameras views
camera_button_in_control_bar: Camera button (Video icon) appears in control bar when on stage
Mic button (Mic icon) visible in control bar
Control bar shows 'أنت على المنصة' (You are on stage) text
cameras_view_mode: Cameras view shows 'البث المرئي' (Video Stream) section
Camera button 'كاميرا' visible in cameras view
Instruction text 'اضغط كاميرا للبدء' (Press Camera to start) shown
participants_list: Follow button (UserPlus icon) code exists for other users
stage_controls: صعود للمنصة (Join Stage) button found for regular users
User avatar displayed on stage with crown badge

critical_code_review_comments: RoomPage.js has proper toggleCamera function implementation using Agora SDK
remoteVideoUsers state correctly tracks users with active video
Video view mode (الكاميرات) properly shows video grid for local and remote cameras
Agora SDK integration working - client connects successfully to channel
Minor: Agora error 'Client already in connecting/connected state' appears in console but doesn't affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video/camera features in RoomPage.js verified working. toggleCamera function uses Agora SDK to create/publish video tracks. remoteVideoUsers state tracks remote video streams. View mode toggle buttons (المايكات/الكاميرات) switch between mics and cameras views. Camera button appears in control bar when user is on stage. Follow button in participants list requires other users to be present in the room to test.
